about.title: About SportFix
about.subtitle: Your trusted source for live sports scores and real-time odds across 500+ leagues worldwide.
about.missionText: SportFix delivers real-time sports data to help fans stay informed and make smarter decisions. We aggregate live scores, match statistics, and odds from trusted sources across the globe.
about.feature1Text: Real-time scores across football, basketball, tennis, hockey and 30+ sports updated every few seconds.
about.feature2Text: Detailed head-to-head stats, form guides, and historical data to give you the full picture.
about.feature3Text: Compare odds from leading bookmakers. Find the best value for your predictions.
about.feature4Text: From Champions League to local divisions — we cover competitions worldwide.
about.poweredByText: SportFix is built on the SportFix data platform, providing reliable and accurate sports information for the Belgian and European market.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: SportFix ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.
privacy.section1Text: We may collect non-personal information such as browser type, device type, pages visited, and time spent on our site. We do not collect personal identification information unless you voluntarily provide it (e.g., via the contact form).
privacy.section2Text: We use collected information to improve our website, analyze usage patterns, personalize content, and ensure security. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.section3Text: Our website uses cookies to enhance your experience. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences. See our Cookie Policy for more details.
privacy.section4Text: We may use third-party analytics services (e.g., Google Analytics) that collect anonymized data. These services have their own privacy policies.
privacy.section5Text: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy.section6Text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through our Contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing and using SportFix, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.section1Text: SportFix provides sports scores, statistics, and odds data for informational purposes only. We do not facilitate betting, gambling, or financial transactions of any kind.
terms.section2Text: While we strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information, we make no warranties or guarantees regarding the completeness or accuracy of the data displayed. Always verify information with official sources before making decisions.
terms.section3Text: All content on SportFix, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of SportFix or its content suppliers and is protected by intellectual property laws.
terms.section4Text: You agree not to misuse our services, attempt to gain unauthorized access, or use automated systems to scrape or extract data from our website.
terms.section5Text: SportFix shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of or inability to use our services.
terms.section6Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our website after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how SportFix uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookiePolicy.section1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the website remember your preferences and improve your experience.
cookiePolicy.section2Text: We use cookies to remember your theme preference (dark/light mode), language selection, and to analyze site traffic. We do not use cookies for advertising or tracking across other websites.
cookiePolicy.essentialText: Required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.
cookiePolicy.functionalText: Remember your preferences such as language and theme settings.
cookiePolicy.analyticsText: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website to improve our services.
cookiePolicy.section4Text: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
